archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) - Modified for Premium SaaS

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter text-white leading-none
hierarchy.h2: text-3xl md:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight text-white leading-tight

layout_and_spacing.strategy: The Control Room Grid (Dashboard) + The Tetris Grid (Marketing)

surfaces_and_micro_themes.header: Crystal Glass: bg-[#0A0F2E]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/5 sticky top-0 z-50
surfaces_and_micro_themes.cards: Solid flat: bg-[#131936] border border-white/5 hover:border-[#00D4C8]/30 transition-colors duration-300
surfaces_and_micro_themes.interactive_elements: The Tracing Beam effect for active campaigns or premium feature tiers.

animations_and_interactions.hover: Slight lift (-translate-y-1) for cards, brightness boost for buttons, border color shift to #00D4C8.
animations_and_interactions.page_transitions: Fade in with slight upward slide (framer-motion).
animations_and_interactions.loading_states: ASCII loaders or pulsing #00D4C8 glowing dots (No default spinners).

buttons.primary: bg-[#00D4C8] text-[#0A0F2E] font-bold tracking-tight rounded-md px-6 py-3 hover:bg-[#00D4C8]/80 transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white font-medium rounded-md px-6 py-3 hover:bg-white/5 hover:border-white/40 transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-white/70 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5 px-4 py-2 rounded-md transition-colors

inputs.default: bg-[#0A0F2E] border border-white/10 rounded-md px-4 py-3 text-white focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#00D4C8]/50 focus:border-[#00D4C8] placeholder-white/30

kanban_board.column: bg-[#0A0F2E] rounded-lg border border-white/5 p-4 flex flex-col gap-4
kanban_board.card: bg-[#131936] border border-white/5 rounded-md p-4 cursor-grab hover:border-[#00D4C8]/30 active:cursor-grabbing shadow-sm

influencer_discovery_card.structure: Grid based bento format. Top section image, bottom section stats. Use p-4 internal.
influencer_discovery_card.match_score: Glowing ring or stark bold text in #00D4C8. It is the north star metric here.

accessibility.contrast: Text over backgrounds exceeds WCAG AA (4.5:1). Dark navy with pure white or teal ensures extremely high contrast.
accessibility.focus: All interactive elements must use focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-[#00D4C8] focus-visible:ring-offset-2 focus-visible:ring-offset-[#0A0F2E].
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='login-button', data-testid='campaign-card').

media.icons: lucide-react (stroke-width 1.5 for a sharp, technical look).

hero_background.description: Abstract blue glowing lines representing AI marketing network.

dashboard_texture.description: Subtle dark abstract clock/wave texture for dashboard blank states or auth background.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the Deep Navy (#0A0F2E) base. Do not use generic tailwind slate/gray unless tinted heavily.
Never use purely transparent headers. Always use Crystal Glass protocol defined above.
For the Kanban pipeline, maximize screen estate. Use dense data design. No massive padding inside the kanban column wrappers.
Influencer match scores are the main 'A-ha' feature. Highlight them vividly in Electric Teal.
Use Shadcn UI components but strip their default borders/backgrounds to match the 'Solid Flat' card specification.
Ensure all async AI actions (Campaign Wizard, AI Onboarding) have robust loading states with dynamic messages.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Ensure 'Outfit' font family is added and applied to h1-h4.
